description: This is a modern 'Namespaces View' dashboard for your Kubernetes cluster(s). Made for kube-prometheus-stack and take advantage of the latest Grafana features. GitHub repository: https://github.com/dotdc/grafana-dashboards-kubernetes

panels.title: Namespace(s) usage on total cluster CPU in %
Namespace(s) usage on total cluster RAM in %

targets.expr: sum(kube_deployment_spec_replicas{namespace=~"$namespace"} * on(deployment, namespace) group_left() max by(deployment, namespace) (kube_deployment_labels{label_app_kubernetes_io_component=~"$component"}))

kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_labels{label_app_kubernetes_io_component=~"$component"} * on(horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace) group_right(label_owner, label_app_kubernetes_io_component) (kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_status_current_replicas{namespace=~"$namespace"} / on(horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace) group_right() kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_spec_max_replicas * 100) * on(horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace) group_left(label_owner, label_app_kubernetes_io_component) kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_labels

panels.description: No data is generally a good thing here.

targets.expr: sum(kube_pod_container_status_terminated_reason{namespace=~"${namespace}", cluster="$cluster", reason="OOMKilled", pod=~"${replicaset}.*"}) by (namespace, pod) > 0 or sum(kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{namespace=~"${namespace}", cluster="$cluster", reason="OOMKilled", pod=~"${replicaset}.*"}) by (namespace, pod) > 0

panels.title: OOM Events by namespace, pod

panels.description: No data is generally a good thing here.
panels.title: Container Restarts by namespace, pod

targets.expr: sum(kube_deployment_status_replicas_available{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster="$cluster"}) by (deployment, namespace) * on (deployment, namespace) group_left() max by(deployment, namespace) (kube_deployment_labels{label_app_kubernetes_io_component=~"$component"})

(sum(kube_deployment_status_replicas_unavailable{namespace=~"$namespace",  cluster="$cluster"}) by (namespace, deployment) > 0) * on (namespace, deployment) group_left() max by(deployment, namespace) (kube_deployment_labels{label_app_kubernetes_io_component=~"$component"})

kube_pod_info{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster="$cluster", pod_ip!=""} * on(node, cluster) group_left(label_topology_kubernetes_io_zone) max by(node, cluster, label_topology_kubernetes_io_zone) (kube_node_labels{cluster="$cluster"})

panels.title: Persistent Volumes - Capacity and usage in %
Persistent Volumes - Capacity and usage in bytes

title: Kubernetes / Views / Namespaces / Replicasets
